kept.text:
Peter Thiel talks about this.

zero-to-one is creating retatrutide.
one-to-100 is scaling it globally.

in a Thielian world, Eli Lilly is the winner. Unfortunately, they can't defend the IP yet. There is no enforcement. Thiel would say this is a failure of the state.

Eli Lilly captured the most valuable layer. Once doctors begin to prescribe it and insurance pays for it, they win in a landslide. 

But for now cost of replication is near zero and they have to jump thru regulatory hoops. It's an institutional failure that has allowed the Chinese to siphon off this much value.

When Reta passes trials they will go scorched earth with customs intercepting packages, lawsuits against resellers, having the DEA and FBI shut down their websites. Risk reward will get too lopsided for vendors and they'll move on to the next thing.

tweet.text:
Trump yesterday started to push MFN deal with $LLY $NVO. 

The deal where LLY and NVO lower their price to $245 for Tirzepatide (Mounjaro and Zepbound) plus semaglutide (Ozempic pen, Ozempic pill, wegovy pen and wegovy pill) 

Where the senior only have to pay $50 to get acces to obesity meds. 

In a time where he’s never been more unpopular, this deal is one of the very positive and popular stories he can use to divert attention from Iran etc. 

Up until now I have said I want too see the Medicare deal go live. That I could see the administration put a cap on how many seniors will be allowed to acces these much lower prices. 

For each million seniors at Medicare, the cost for the government will be  about $2.3B upfront. 

However since the price will also apply all those who already are using these meds in Medicare = savings for the government. 

This means the first 2-3 million extra seniors will be cost neutral for MediCare. 

If 10 million gets acces it will cost +$15B upfront for Medicare. 

How much is Trump willing to spend…….

The more he promotes the deal as he did yesterday, the more likely he will accept a higher cost and thereby more seniors to get acces. 

For both $LLY and $NVO this is very high on their agenda. How to convert as many seniors as possible 

$VKTX

quoted_tweet.text: President Trump: "Starting on July 1, we will also provide Medicare patients with the coverage for weight loss drugs like Ozempic, Zepbound, Wegovy. Will be available for $50 a month." https://t.co/ASuYyOfKdG
